blended.narrative: Breckenridge is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.9 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 10,441 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 6" over the past week. Current depth: 28".
